data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of auto-confirmation for customers who opted into 'instant accept'. However, the evidence provided does not include any checks or confirmations that demonstrate this functionality is implemented. Specifically, there is no evidence of the system confirming an offer automatically when a customer has opted into 'instant accept', indicating a clear gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of auto-confirmation functionality for customers who opted into 'instant accept'.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
